mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE Hierarchy AS ( -- 初始查询：找到当前用户的直接上级 SELECT mu.id AS current_user_id, tbu.bind_user_id AS parent_user_id, mu.level_id AS current_level_id, 1 AS level_depth -- 层级深度（直接上级为 1 层） FROM trade_brokerage_user tbu JOIN member_user mu ON tbu.bind_user_id = mu.id WHERE tbu.id = #{userId} -- 请替换为实际的用户 ID
UNION ALL
-- 递归查询：逐层向上查找上级的上级 SELECT h.current_user_id, tbu.bind_user_id AS parent_user_id, mu.level_id AS current_level_id, h.level_depth + 1 AS level_depth FROM Hierarchy h JOIN trade_brokerage_user tbu ON h.parent_user_id = tbu.id JOIN member_user mu ON tbu.bind_user_id = mu.id)
-- 最终查询：在递归结果中筛选等级为4的用户，并取第一个（层级最浅的） SELECT mu.id FROM Hierarchy h JOIN member_user mu ON h.parent_user_id = mu.id JOIN member_level ml ON mu.level_id = ml.id WHERE ml.level = 4 ORDER BY h.level_depth ASC -- 按层级升序，确保先找到最近的上级 LIMIT 1;

WITH RECURSIVE temp_tree AS ( SELECT id FROM trade_brokerage_user WHERE bind_user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT u.id FROM trade_brokerage_user u JOIN temp_tree t ON u.bind_user_id = t.id WHERE u.deleted = 0 ) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_tree

WITH RECURSIVE temp_tree AS ( SELECT id, create_time FROM trade_brokerage_user WHERE bind_user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT u.id, u.create_time FROM trade_brokerage_user u JOIN temp_tree t ON u.bind_user_id = t.id WHERE u.deleted = 0 ) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_tree WHERE create_time >= #{createTime}

WITH RECURSIVE descendants AS ( SELECT u.id, u.bind_user_id, u.brokerage_enabled, 1 AS depth FROM trade_brokerage_user u WHERE u.bind_user_id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT child.id, child.bind_user_id, child.brokerage_enabled, d.depth + 1 FROM trade_brokerage_user child JOIN descendants d ON child.bind_user_id = d.id WHERE child.deleted = 0 ) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM descendants d WHERE d.depth > 1
AND d.brokerage_enabled = #{enabled}

WITH RECURSIVE temp_tree AS ( -- 初始查询：获取直接下级 SELECT u.id FROM trade_brokerage_user u WHERE u.bind_user_id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0
UNION ALL
-- 递归查询：获取下级的下级 SELECT child.id FROM trade_brokerage_user child JOIN temp_tree t ON child.bind_user_id = t.id WHERE child.deleted = 0 ) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_tree t LEFT JOIN member_user m ON t.id = m.id
AND m.level_id = #{level}
AND ( m.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%') OR m.mobile LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%') OR CAST(t.id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%') )

WITH RECURSIVE descendants AS ( SELECT u.id, 1 AS depth FROM trade_brokerage_user u WHERE u.bind_user_id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT child.id, d.depth + 1 FROM trade_brokerage_user child JOIN descendants d ON child.bind_user_id = d.id WHERE child.deleted = 0 ) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM descendants d JOIN trade_brokerage_user u ON d.id = u.id LEFT JOIN member_user m ON d.id = m.id WHERE d.depth > 1 AND u.brokerage_enabled = 1
AND m.level_id = #{level}
AND ( m.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%') OR m.mobile LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%') OR CAST(d.id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%') )

WITH RECURSIVE company_hierarchy AS ( -- 初始查询：从当前用户开始 SELECT bu.id, bu.bind_user_id, mu.level_id, ml.name as level_name, 1 as depth FROM trade_brokerage_user bu LEFT JOIN member_user mu ON bu.id = mu.id LEFT JOIN member_level ml ON mu.level_id = ml.id WHERE bu.id = #{userId} AND bu.deleted = 0
UNION ALL
-- 递归查询：向上查找上级 SELECT bu.id, bu.bind_user_id, mu.level_id, ml.name as level_name, ch.depth + 1 FROM trade_brokerage_user bu LEFT JOIN member_user mu ON bu.id = mu.id LEFT JOIN member_level ml ON mu.level_id = ml.id INNER JOIN company_hierarchy ch ON bu.id = ch.bind_user_id WHERE bu.deleted = 0 AND ch.depth < 10 -- 防止无限递归 ) SELECT bu.* FROM company_hierarchy ch INNER JOIN trade_brokerage_user bu ON ch.id = bu.id WHERE ch.level_name IN ('总公司', '分公司') ORDER BY ch.depth ASC LIMIT 1

WITH RECURSIVE ancestor_chain AS ( -- 初始节点：当前用户 SELECT bu.id, bu.bind_user_id, 1 AS depth FROM trade_brokerage_user bu WHERE bu.id = #{userId} AND bu.deleted = 0
UNION ALL
-- 向上递归查找上级 SELECT parent.id, parent.bind_user_id, ancestor_chain.depth + 1 FROM trade_brokerage_user parent INNER JOIN ancestor_chain ON ancestor_chain.bind_user_id = parent.id WHERE parent.deleted = 0 AND ancestor_chain.depth < 50 -- 防止无限递归 ) SELECT bu.* FROM ancestor_chain ac INNER JOIN trade_brokerage_user bu ON ac.id = bu.id ORDER BY ac.depth DESC LIMIT 1

WITH RECURSIVE team_tree AS ( -- 初始查询：根用户 SELECT bu.*, 1 as level_depth FROM trade_brokerage_user bu WHERE bu.id = #{rootUserId} AND bu.deleted = 0
UNION ALL
-- 递归查询：获取所有下级，但遇到分公司时停止该分支 SELECT bu.*, tt.level_depth + 1 FROM trade_brokerage_user bu INNER JOIN team_tree tt ON bu.bind_user_id = tt.id LEFT JOIN member_user mu ON bu.id = mu.id LEFT JOIN member_level ml ON mu.level_id = ml.id WHERE bu.deleted = 0 AND tt.level_depth < 10 -- 防止无限递归 AND (ml.name IS NULL OR ml.name NOT IN ('分公司', '总公司') OR tt.level_depth = 1) -- 边界控制：遇到分公司时停止，除非是第一层 ) SELECT bu.* FROM team_tree tt INNER JOIN trade_brokerage_user bu ON tt.id = bu.id ORDER BY tt.level_depth, bu.create_time
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trade_brokerage_user WHERE bind_user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
